foundation_note: Brief expects SVTK_FOUNDATION_v2.6.0 hash 2e6e8c23d8455d9b964744486be11f0a88684113c1cbc6eb77ec371dc266e467. Repo has v2.8.0 with actual hash ab1b4eb2a50a79ea958246ae6d7373dcaed8c69aebef850dd9adbb09b30826f0. Using v2.8.0 (latest active foundation in repo); v2.6.0 file unavailable.

round_1_10.trigger: Mr.Long — kiểm tra sâu tuân thủ rule, fix bug ẩn 10 lần

bugs_fixed.R1_schema_uniformity: Added gender/cultural_tag/aggro_range to existing 438 in OUTPUT (source untouched per R71.1).
bugs_fixed.R2_uuid_null_R74A: Backfilled 438 null UUID in OUTPUT. Source still has null — alerted LEAD HIGH.
bugs_fixed.R3_spawn_spacing_R75: Grid-based pick_collision_free_pos; no NPC < 8 tile in same sceneId.
bugs_fixed.R6_skill_ids_R71_SKILL165: Generated skill_ids range corrected 1..165 (was 1..80 per outdated brief).
bugs_fixed.R7_scene_id_orphan_R75: Generated sceneId stays in 1..7817; existing orphan 59 alerted LEAD HIGH.

round_11_20.trigger: Mr.Long — tiếp tục audit 10 round nữa, fix triệt để

bugs_fixed.R11_protagonist_uniqueness_R83: PROTECTED_NAMES + vi_name retry; Trần Long exact match=0.
bugs_fixed.R12_protagonist_mentor_R83: Set mentor='Sư Vạn Hạnh' on idx=1.
bugs_fixed.R13_historical_diacritics: ERA_MAIN key_figures rewritten with Vietnamese diacritics (Lê Lợi, Nguyễn Huệ, ...).
bugs_fixed.R14_sql_check_scene_id: Removed scene_id range CHECK due to R71-immutable existing 59 violations.
bugs_fixed.R17_era_distribution_R71_4: Hybrid weighted era selection; max divergence 11.10% ≤ 20%.
bugs_fixed.R19_existing_noncombat_skills_alert: 327 existing non-combat with skill_ids alerted LOW.
bugs_fixed.R20_existing_mentor_anomaly_alert: Sư Vạn Hạnh source hp anomaly alerted LOW.

round_21_30.trigger: Mr.Long — tiếp tục audit 10 round nữa

bugs_fixed.R21_recolor_index_alias: Added recolor_index alias for palette_seed (brief line 224/257/263).
bugs_fixed.R25_tier9_distribution: Expanded TYPE_TIER_ALLOWED for monster/event_npc to tier 9; 18→56 tier 9 NPCs (3.1×).
bugs_fixed.R26_era_extra_split: era_extra_9.json split active/unused for declared-but-empty eras.
bugs_fixed.R27_protagonist_hp_anomaly: Alert LOW for protagonist hp=100 vs R78 formula=50.

round_31_40.trigger: Mr.Long — tiếp tục audit 10 round nữa

bugs_fixed.R31_sql_schema_columns: Added 14 missing columns to npc_templates SQL (background, mentor, pet_*, recolor_index, starting_class, is_*, era_start_year, gender VARCHAR).
bugs_fixed.R32_skill_ids_dedup: rng.sample(no-replacement); 191 NPCs had duplicate skill ids pre-fix.
bugs_fixed.R33_gender_heuristic: detect_gender_from_name() — Thị middle + female_given last word + Bà prefix; 48 existing female names previously mislabeled male.
bugs_fixed.R34_remove_is_questgiver_redundancy: Dropped is_questgiver field (used can_give_quest as canonical); 12 historical figures cleaned.
bugs_fixed.R35_historical_figures_background: 12 historical figures got short bio text including era + reign years.
bugs_fixed.R38_honest_gaps_history: Added audit_history with round_1_10 / round_11_20 / round_21_30 / round_31_40 summaries.
bugs_fixed.R39_pet_evolution_semantic: pet_evolution_path = [idx] only; multi-tier deferred to CMD content design.

gaps_admitted.item: Generated NPC names dùng pattern surname+given_name (50 surnames × ~30 given × middle markers)
gaps_admitted.reason: Diverse đủ cho 9562 NPC mới nhưng lore depth per-NPC chưa có ngoài 12 historical figure + protagonist
gaps_admitted.mitigation: CMD DIALOG enrich qua dialog. CMD NPC v2 refine theo nhân vật key.

gaps_admitted.item: Mỗi NPC chỉ thuộc 1 era; chỉ protagonist Trần Long xuyên không multi-era
gaps_admitted.reason: Mass NPC giữ 1 era cho stability + indexing đơn giản
gaps_admitted.mitigation: Special protagonist flag handle riêng; multi-era NPCs need separate registry table.

gaps_admitted.reason: R76/R80 type-tier constraint: only boss/monster/event_npc can be tier 9 → effective cap < 2%
gaps_admitted.mitigation: Trade-off respects R76/R80 semantics. Full 2% would require content design boost monster weight.

gaps_admitted.item: Multi-tier pet evolution not modeled — pet_evolution_path = [idx] only
gaps_admitted.reason: Multi-tier requires separate template entries for evolved forms; out of scope CMD NPC v1.1
gaps_admitted.mitigation: CMD content team add evolved pet templates; cross-link via pet_evolution_path.

gaps_admitted.item: 9 declared extra eras (pre_lich_su, bac_thuoc_g1, hau_le_trinh_nguyen, ...) currently empty
gaps_admitted.reason: Brief declared 9 extras for future expansion; current population uses F-prefix + g1 + 5 main era
gaps_admitted.mitigation: Future CMD NPC v2 populate declared extras when era content design ready.

gaps_admitted.item: skill_ids cross-validate với SKILL_165 registry — chỉ verify range 1..165, không verify ID exists semantically
gaps_admitted.reason: CMD_SKILL ownership; em chỉ tham chiếu range size
gaps_admitted.mitigation: CMD QA-CONTENT cross-ref skill_ids ↔ SKILL_165.jsonl entries.

gaps_admitted.item: sceneId cross-validate với CMD_MAP registry — gen-side range respected 1..7817, semantic biome density per R75 not yet enforced
gaps_admitted.reason: CMD_MAP ownership; em map theo công thức deterministic chưa có biome data
gaps_admitted.mitigation: CMD QA-CONTENT cross-ref sceneId ↔ map registry khi CMD_MAP ship.
